title: Entry Level Data Analyst
description:
Job Description

The role involves providing administrative support (primarily in the form of data entry). Duties in the job include transferring data using Microsoft excel and sorting it with intermediate functions. Candidates will require a degree of comfortability when it comes to math due to nature of the role and what they will be dealing with. Other duties include using spreadsheets to track customer information, organizing data, administrative support, data review for errors, and to provide data entry support as needed. Other duties as needed.Job Type & LocationThis is a Contract to Hire position based out of West Harrison, NY.

Pay and BenefitsThe pay range for this position is $20.00 - $21.00/hr.

Eligibility requirements apply to some benefits and may depend on your job
            classification and length of employment. Benefits are subject to change and may be
            subject to specific elections, plan, or program terms. If eligible, the benefits
            available for this temporary role may include the following:

            
•  Medical, dental & vision
            
•  Critical Illness, Accident, and Hospital
            
•  401(k) Retirement Plan – Pre-tax and Roth post-tax contributions available
            
•  Life Insurance (Voluntary Life & AD&D for the employee and dependents)
            
•  Short and long-term disability
            
•  Health Spending Account (HSA)
            
•  Transportation benefits
            
•  Employee Assistance Program
            
•  Time Off/Leave (PTO, Vacation or Sick Leave)

Workplace TypeThis is a fully onsite position in West Harrison,NY.

Application DeadlineThis position is anticipated to close on Jul 24, 2026.

title: Entry-Level Remote Data Analyst at cewit New York, NY
description:
Entry-Level Remote Data Analyst job at cewit. New York, NY.


 Job Overview
 We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Entry-Level Data Analyst to join our remote team. This role is an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to build a career in data analysis with ample opportunities for growth and professional development. You will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data to provide insights that support business decisions. No prior experience is necessary as we will provide comprehensive training for the right candidate.




 Key Responsibilities
 
 Collect, clean, and organize data from various sources to ensure data accuracy and completeness.
 Perform data analysis using statistical methods and software tools to uncover trends, patterns, and insights.
 Create visual reports and dashboards to communicate findings clearly to stakeholders.
 Assist in the development of data models and predictive analytics to support decision-making processes.
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams (such as marketing, sales, and operations) to understand data needs and provide relevant insights.
 Continuously monitor data quality and identify areas for improvement in data collection and analysis processes.
 Maintain confidentiality of sensitive company data and adhere to data protection regulations.
 


 Qualifications
 
 Bachelor's degree: in a related field (e.g. Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, or a similar discipline) is preferred but not required.
 Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
 Basic knowledge of statistical analysis and data visualization tools (such as Excel, Power BI, or Tableau) is a plus.
 Familiarity with SQL or other database languages is preferred but not mandatory.
 Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think critically.
 Excellent communication skills both written and verbal.
 Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
 Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.
 


 Experience
 
 No prior work experience is required for this entry-level role.
 Familiarity with data analysis concepts through coursework, internships, or personal projects is advantageous.
 


 Benefits
 
 Salary: Competitive starting rate of $45,000 - $85,000 per year (based on experience and qualifications).
 Work-from-home flexibility: Enjoy the convenience of working remotely with flexible hours.
 Health Benefits: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance plans.
 Retirement Plan: 401(k) with company matching to help you plan for your future.
 Paid Time Off: Generous vacation days, paid sick leave, and holidays.
 Professional Development: Access to training programs and courses to enhance your data analysis skills and career progression.
 Career Growth Opportunities: Clear pathways for promotion and development into more advanced roles in data science and analytics.
 


 How to Apply
 We encourage you to apply if you are passionate about data, eager to learn and excited about starting a career in data analysis.




 Remote Work
 Yes

About the job Remote Data Analyst (Entry Level)   

We are looking for a motivated, detail-oriented individual who excels in a fast-paced environment and is able to focus on multiple tasks at once to join our team as our Data Analyst.  

 Job Responsibilities:    

  Analyze material takeoffs and enter sales orders with accuracy   Interpret a wide range of information and identify possible takeoff errors   Generate takeoff-related questions to field personnel to ensure order accuracy   Provide purchasing recommendations of stock items to appropriate personnel based on inventory information gathered during the order entry process   Purchasing of non-stock / special order items   Provide material cost and availability information to estimating, sales, and field management personnel in a timely manner   Create COD material orders and communicate delivery expectations   Cross‑trained to: Maintain delivery schedule, retrieve, and organize field orders, handle expedited orders and administrative duties, prepare shop documents.      Skills and Qualifications:    

  Knowledge of Building Materials and Construction Industry Practices   Organized   Attention to Detail   Data Entry   Computer Skills (Bistrack, Windows/MS Office)   Able to prioritize, make quick decisions, and has strong problem-solving skills   Works Well Independently   Communicates Clearly and Follows Through   Life, Health, Dental, and Vision plans available after 60 Days   Paid Vacation and Holidays after 90 Days   401K with company match after 1st year      Allied Global Marketing is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state or local law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements.

title: Data Analyst, Business Systems
description:
American Express is hiring a  Data Analyst, Business Systems with 0 - 3 years of experience. Based in United States - New York, NY and with Hybrid ways of working. 
  
  Job description and responsibilities: 

The Business Data Analyst role will be responsible for providing analytical support in the delivery of breakthrough innovation and transformational initiatives for the MIS & Analytics organization. The key focus of this role is to leverage data to improve the economics and efficiency of the Travel and Lifestyle Services operational inbound contact center processes and digital servicing channels.


Find your place in MIS and Analytics on #TeamAmex.


Responsibilities but not limited to: 


Query and analyze large sets of data to draw conclusions and make recommendations to the business using statistical models and data mining techniques combined with business and operational knowledge.
Conducting various analyses and providing thought leadership to identify new ideas that lead to improved efficiency and customer experience in our Inbound Contact Center.
Support the business with the identification of process improvements opportunities, feasibility studies, demand management efforts, and defect eliminations for the purposes of generating cost-savings and improving customer satisfaction.
Work closely with Operations leaders and Project Managers to further develop existing ideas, prioritize them, and implement them.


 
  
  Requirements and qualifications: Minimum Qualifications:


Bachelor’s Degree in Analytics, Industrial Engineering, Process Improvement or Computer Science related is required.
Query performance tuning skills using SQL.
Experience in using advanced data analytics tools to perform analysis and uncover the insights.
A creative and innovative professional with strong analytical background.
Self-starter and naturally curious about finding transformational and customer experience improvement opportunities.
Critical skills include proficiency with analytical and process improvement tools and techniques, strategic thought leadership and execution skills, strong negotiation skills and data mining skills to generate rich insights.
Excellent written/verbal communication skills and the ability to thrive in a dynamic and fast-paced environment are required.
Ability to create professional presentations that are simple, easy to follow and powerful enough to influence stakeholders on business decisions.
Preferred Qualifications:


At least 2-3 years of working experience in Analytics or Process Improvement.
Industry Experience as Project/Data Analyst with a track record of pulling, manipulating, processing, and developing meaningful insights from large datasets.
Proficiency in Tableau or PowerBI.
Understanding or experience with Data Mining and Machine Learning Algorithms.
Experience with using Big Data Technology including Hadoop and Hive.

title: Entry-Level Business Analyst
description:
Company: STEM Healthcare

Position: Insights Associate (Entry-Level Business Analyst)

Location: 3 days in the York office and 2 remote days - hybrid

Vacancy Type: Headcount/ Permanent

Salary: Competitive

Join our dynamic and fast-paced global pharmaceutical advisory firm headquartered in the UK! We are seeking an analytical and results-driven professional to become a vital part of our business analysis team. This role offers an unparalleled opportunity to develop a comprehensive understanding of the pharmaceutical industry while honing your quantitative and qualitative analysis skills. You will gain unique insights into industry best practices and establish relationships with senior stakeholders early in your career.

Key Responsibilities:

Liaise with internal STEM senior leadership and project teams to define project delivery requirements.Manage multiple client projects simultaneously to ensure that internal and client deadlines are met.Build and maintain databases using MS Excel, drawing from various source data.Analyze client data using quantitative and qualitative methods to assess key performance indicators.Pressure test source data, identifying areas for further investigation.Collaborate with Directors and local teams to interpret data, formulating actionable recommendations and plans for clients.Produce high-quality presentations and deliverables for clients utilizing MS PowerPoint.Support team members to meet deadlines while driving development and efficiency within the analysis team.Growth Opportunities:

STEM is well-respected by its clients and is a rapidly growing business, providing numerous opportunities for advancement for successful candidates. We offer pathways to more senior and international roles for talented individuals committed to their career development.

Essential Skills:

A degree in Economics or a Science-based field with a strong numerical emphasis (Biology, Chemistry, Mathematics, Engineering, Economics, etc.)Experience in a similar analytical role, preferably within the Pharmaceutical/Healthcare industry.Strong communication and project management skills for handling multiple projects with diverse stakeholders.Advanced proficiency in MS Excel and PowerPoint.A proactive attitude, ambition, and a robust work ethic to thrive in a dynamic environment.Analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.Don’t meet every job requirement? That’s okay! We encourage all interested candidates to apply, even if their experience doesn’t perfectly align. You might be the perfect fit for this role or others!

title: Business Analyst (Entry Level)
description:
Worried About Investing in a Job Placement Program? Here's Why It Could Save Your Career-Especially If You're on OPT 
 If you're a CS graduate on OPT, you're likely feeling the pressure. You've studied for years, taken certifications, maybe even done a bootcamp-but now you're stuck in a job hunt that feels endless. You're watching the days count down toward your STEM extension deadline, wondering if the degree you worked so hard for will pay off. 
 We hear you-and we want to be honest:  you can't afford to wait.  Not just financially, but professionally and legally. 
 ⚠ The Hidden Costs of "Waiting It Out" 
 Let's say you decide not to invest in a placement program like SynergisticIT because it seems expensive. Here's what that decision could really cost:   Unemployment beyond 90 days on OPT  jeopardizes your immigration status    Gaps on your resume  become harder to explain and raise red flags    Stagnant technical skills  fall behind rapidly in cloud, DevOps, and AI tools    Lost income  $80K-$120K/year in starting salary potential, gone while you wait    H-1B denial risk  without a job, there's no employer to file for you  In short, waiting can cost you your future in the U.S. 
 The ROI: What You Get from Investing in SynergisticIT 
 Yes, our program requires a $10K investment-but what you get in return isn't just another classroom experience. You get  career-launching, legally stabilizing, high-earning transformation  . Here's the potential return:  Job offers in 3-6 months  from major tech clients like Google, PayPal, Apple, and more   verage salaries starting at $100K+  , meaning your investment can pay for itself in weeks   Guaranteed STEM-qualified roles  in Java development, data science, DevOps, or data engineering   E-Verified employers who sponsor H-1B and Green Card for eligible candidates   guidance from experts  who won't stop working with you until you're placed  It's not just training-it's your immigration backup plan, your financial launchpad, and your future-proofing solution. 
 View real success stories from OPT students who got hired 
 Still on the Fence? 
 sk yourself this: Would you invest today if you could be earning $100K+ by next quarter-while securing your visa status and career stability? 
 Now ask this: Can you afford the risk if you don't? 
 • Our Promise to You 
 If you work hard, follow the program, and stay committed-we'll match your energy step-for-step until you're hired. No shortcuts, no vague promises-just clear paths, proven results, and a support system built around your goals. 
 You're not just buying into a course. You're investing in  peace of mind, job security, and financial freedom. 
 pply today nd let's get you from waiting to winning.

title: Junior Business Analyst - Fully Remote
description:
We’re a global software consultancy that loves solving complex problems with technology. We bridge the gap between strategy and execution, helping our clients strengthen their core tech, scale flexibly, and create seamless digital experiences.
 

 

 With our extensive experience in software development, we've pioneered open-source products that help development teams build better software. We work closely with our clients to continuously evolve their tech and adopt an adaptive mindset to achieve their business goals.
 

 

 We’re expanding and adding exciting new services for our clients. We're looking for talented individuals to join us and make a difference. Come be part of a team where your ideas and skills will drive innovation and growth.
 

 

 About the role
 

 

 We are seeking a dynamic Junior Business Analyst to join our team. As a Junior Business Analyst, you will play a crucial role in analyzing business processes, identifying opportunities for improvement, and providing actionable insights to drive strategic decision-making. This role offers an exciting opportunity to gain exposure to various aspects of business operations and contribute to the growth and success of our organization.
 

 

 

 Day-to-day responsibilities
 

 

 - Gathering and documenting business requirements from stakeholders.
 

 - Analyzing data to identify trends, patterns, and key performance indicators.
 

 - Conducting research and market analysis to support business planning and strategy development.
 

 - Assisting in the preparation of reports, presentations, and business cases.
 

 - Collaborating with cross-functional teams to implement process improvements and solutions.
 

 - Participating in meetings and workshops to facilitate communication and alignment on business objectives.
 

 - Supporting the evaluation of project initiatives and their impact on business outcomes.
 

 

 

 

 About you
 

 

 - Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or related field.
 

 - Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret and synthesize complex data.
 

 - Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and other analytical tools.
 

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to effectively engage with stakeholders at all levels.
 

 - Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy and quality in analysis and documentation.
 

 - Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
 

 - Prior experience in business analysis, consulting, or related internships is a plus.
 

 

 

 Our benefits
 

 

 - 401k Retirement Plan: Secure your future with our comprehensive 401k retirement plan.
 

 - Insurance Coverage: Enjoy peace of mind with our comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance plans.
 

 - Remote-First Environment: Embrace flexibility with our remote-first policy, allowing you to work from anywhere.
 

 - Extra Days Off: Recharge and rejuvenate with additional days off to pursue your passions and spend time with loved ones.
 

 - Parental Leave: Support your growing family with generous parental leave options.
 

 - Gym and Yoga Membership Reimbursement: Prioritize your well-being with reimbursement for gym and yoga memberships.
 

 - Semi-Annual Company Retreat: Connect with colleagues and recharge at our exciting semi-annual company retreats, fostering team spirit and innovation. 
 

 

 We are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. If you believe you would be a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. We look forward to hearing from you and discovering how your unique talents and perspectives can contribute to our team's success.
reasoning: Newly discovered job (awaiting tomorrow's AI run to score).
